race.comment: HANNABANA (6) returned a good figure two back when beaten under two lengths over 1200m at the Sunshine Coast. Couldn't maintain the pressure on-speed over 1000m at the same circuit last start. Cherry ripe after three runs back and today's race looks a much better fit. AEROPOWER (2) broke through for his maiden win at the sixth attempt last time out, getting home with a bit to spare over 1000m at Dalby. Racing well deep into the maiden campaign. This is not out of reach. ENCHAANTED (5) showing a nice change of gears when it mattered to pick up her first win recently over 1200m at Kilcoy. Lightly raced filly with more to offer. RIVA D'AMOR (4) has been in the money at all three runs this prep. Caught the eye late at the Gold Coast over 1000m last start. Down in class and not out of the contest. MISS ZERMATT (1) backs up seven days after a nice first-up effort over today's journey at Beaudesert. Has good second-up stats so she should hold the form.
